================================================================================
GOLDEN DEER — PREMIUM ROASTED MAKHANA
Complete Brand & Product Knowledge Base for AI Consumption
================================================================================

Last updated: July 2026
Canonical domain: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd

================================================================================
1. BRAND OVERVIEW
================================================================================

Golden Deer is a premium roasted makhana (fox nuts) snack brand owned and
operated by Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd., an Indian FMCG enterprise headquartered
in Bihar, India. The brand symbol — a golden deer — represents purity, agility,
and natural vitality.

Vision: Make Golden Deer a household name in healthy snacking.
Mission: Sustainably sourced, ethically processed superfood snacks that empower
farming partner communities.

Legal Entity:
  Company:         Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd.
  CIN:             U46307BR2026PTC085787
  GSTIN:           10AANCC9477F2ZG
  Startup India:   DIPP269634
  MSME:            UDYAM-BR-26-0237862
  Address:         HN-1639, Gangachak Malikana, Masaurhi, Bihar 804452
  Email:           chandan@cosmicpower.ltd
  WhatsApp:        +91 97791 55132

Brand Foundations:
  - Makhana (Euryale ferox) is a seed harvested from the Gangetic wetlands of
    Bihar, India. It is not a grain — it is a superfood seed from the water lily
    family, naturally gluten-free, high in protein and antioxidants, very low in fat.
  - Golden Deer sources directly from farming partner cooperatives in Bihar's
    makhana belt, ensuring traceable lots, fair-trade practices, and consistent
    jumbo-grade quality.
  - The brand operates on a two-funnel principle:
    * Funnel A (D2C Retail): Premium-snack buyers purchase via quick-commerce
      platforms (Blinkit, Zepto primary; Amazon secondary). No on-site cart.
    * Funnel B (Bulk/Wholesale): Distributors, retailers, HoReCa, corporate
      gifting, and export buyers convert through the /bulk page, a segmented
      inquiry form, and a prefilled WhatsApp bulk-quote link.

Key Differentiators:
  - Clean-label: every ingredient is recognisable as real food. Classic Roast
    has exactly three ingredients.
  - Hand-sorted jumbo-grade seeds (5-6 suta / 18-24mm) — the largest, most
    consistent grade available.
  - Touchless slow-roasting in small batches — never fried, no trans fats.
  - Nitrogen-flushed packaging for extended shelf life (8-12 months).
  - Direct farm partnerships with traceable lots and fair-trade practices.
  - Third-party lab analysis available on every lot.

================================================================================
2. PRODUCT RANGE — FULL DESCRIPTIONS
================================================================================

--- Product A: Classic Plain (https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/products/plain) ---
Slug: plain
Name: Classic Plain
Tagline: Pure. Lightly Salted. Irresistibly Crunchy.
MRP: Rs. 99
Net Weights: 50g, 100g, 200g

Description:
The taste that started it all. Our Classic Roast makhana is popped to golden
perfection in the lightest veil of premium cold-pressed oil and finished with a
whisper of fine sea salt. Every puff carries the pure, nutty essence of
hand-picked jumbo fox nuts — nothing more, nothing less.

Full Description:
Clean-label snacking at its most honest. We begin with the largest grade of raw
makhana, sourced directly from farming partners across Bihar's pristine wetlands.
Each seed is touchless-roasted in small batches using a gentle dry-heat process
that preserves the natural structure and delicate crunch. A trace of cold-pressed
oil and a sprinkle of sea salt is all that touches these golden puffs. No
artificial flavours, no preservatives, no compromise. The result is a snack that
tastes of its origin — earth, water, and the quiet labour of hands that have
cultivated this grain for generations.

Nutrition (per 100g): Energy 347 kcal, Protein 9.7g, Carbs 76.9g, Fat 0.1g
Ingredients: Premium makhana (fox nuts), Cold-pressed sunflower oil, Fine sea salt
Tags: Classic, Lightly Salted, Clean Label, Everyday Snack

Commerce Links:
  - Blinkit: ADD_URL  |  Zepto: ADD_URL  |  Amazon: ADD_URL
  - Indiamart: ADD_URL  |  Instamart: ADD_URL


--- Product B: Salted (https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/products/salted) ---
Slug: salted
Name: Salted
Tagline: A Perfect Marriage of Mineral Salt and Cracked Pepper.
MRP: Rs. 109
Net Weights: 50g, 100g, 200g

Description:
Elevated. Ancient Himalayan pink salt meets freshly cracked black peppercorns on
our signature slow-roasted makhana. The salt's subtle mineral complexity —
pink-hued, sun-dried, hand-mined from the Khewra range — balances the warm bite
of Tellicherry pepper for a savoury snack that feels deliberate, not accidental.

Full Description:
This is not your standard salted snack. We source Himalayan pink salt from deep
within the Punjab salt range, valued for its rich mineral profile and clean,
rounded salinity. Each crystal is dry-milled to a fine powder, then dusted over
freshly roasted makhana alongside coarsely ground Tellicherry black pepper known
for its bold aromatic punch. The combination is timeless: earthy pepper heat
softened by mineral salt, wrapped in the ethereal crunch of slow-roasted fox
nuts. A grown-up snack for discerning palates, as at home in a desk drawer as
on a charcuterie board.

Nutrition (per 100g): Energy 350 kcal, Protein 9.5g, Carbs 75.8g, Fat 0.3g
Ingredients: Premium makhana (fox nuts), Cold-pressed sunflower oil, Himalayan
pink salt, Coarse black pepper
Tags: Savory, Pink Salt, Black Pepper, Gourmet


--- Product C: Peri Peri (https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/products/peri-peri) ---
Slug: peri-peri
Name: Peri Peri
Tagline: Sun-Ripened Tang in Every Crunch.
MRP: Rs. 109
Net Weights: 50g, 100g, 200g

Description:
A burst of sun-ripened tomato goodness on a cloud of roasted makhana. We marry
the bright acidity of real tomato with a whisper of spice, creating a snack that
hits every note: tangy, savoury, and satisfyingly crisp.

Full Description:
Inspired by India's eternal love affair with tangy-spicy snacks, our Tangy
Tomato makhana is a masterclass in clean-label flavouring. We start with
vine-ripened tomatoes, slow-dried and ground into a fine powder, then blended
with a proprietary spice mix that uses no artificial colours, no MSG, and no
synthetic flavour enhancers. The result is a dusting of authentic tomato that
clings to every crevice of the puffed makhana, delivering a bright, moreish tang
with just enough warmth to keep you reaching for another handful.

Nutrition (per 100g): Energy 353 kcal, Protein 9.2g, Carbs 74.5g, Fat 0.5g
Ingredients: Premium makhana (fox nuts), Cold-pressed sunflower oil, Tomato
powder, Spices, Sea salt
Tags: Tangy, Tomato, Spiced, Bold Flavour


--- Product D: Creamy Cheese (https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/products/creamy-cheese) ---
Slug: creamy-cheese
Name: Creamy Cheese
Tagline: Real Cheese. Real Crunch. Real Good.
MRP: Rs. 119
Net Weights: 50g, 100g, 200g

Description:
For the cheese lover who refuses to compromise on clean eating. We coat each
makhana puff in a whisper of real cheddar and cultured buttermilk powder,
creating a creamy, tangy cheese flavour that tastes of something — not of
chemicals.

Full Description:
Cheese-flavoured snacks usually mean a lab-engineered powder with a dozen
unpronounceable ingredients. Ours is different. We start with real aged cheddar,
dried and milled into a fine powder, then blended with cultured buttermilk for
that unmistakable tang. A touch of mustard and turmeric adds depth and warmth,
while the makhana itself — light, airy, slow-roasted — becomes the perfect canvas
for this creamy coating. No artificial cheese flavouring, no palm oil, no MSG.
Just the honest taste of real cheddar on India's cleanest crunch.

Nutrition (per 100g): Energy 358 kcal, Protein 10.1g, Carbs 72.3g, Fat 1.2g
Ingredients: Premium makhana (fox nuts), Cold-pressed sunflower oil, Aged cheddar
powder, Cultured buttermilk powder, Sea salt, Mustard powder, Turmeric
Tags: Cheese, Creamy, Indulgent, Real Cheddar


--- Product E: Pudina (https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/products/pudina) ---
Slug: pudina
Name: Pudina
Tagline: India's Favourite Spice Blend, Now on Makhana.
MRP: Rs. 109
Net Weights: 50g, 100g, 200g

Description:
A bold, aromatic masala blend — cumin, coriander, red chilli, ginger, and a hint
of amchur — dusted generously over our signature golden puffs. This is makhana
for the chaat lover: complex, layered, and fiery in all the right ways.

Full Description:
Masala is not a single flavour — it is a philosophy of layering. Our master
blenders spent months perfecting this mix: the earthy warmth of roasted cumin,
the citrus lift of coriander, the slow-building heat of Kashmiri red chilli, the
tang of dried mango powder, and a whisper of ginger that lingers on the palate.
Each spice is individually toasted and ground, then blended in small batches to
ensure every grain of makhana catches the full spectrum. The result is a snack
that unfolds on the tongue — first warm, then tangy, then building to a gentle,
satisfying heat. No artificial enhancers, no flavouring agents: just the purest
spices India has to offer, in the proportions they deserve.

Nutrition (per 100g): Energy 355 kcal, Protein 9.3g, Carbs 73.8g, Fat 0.6g
Ingredients: Premium makhana (fox nuts), Cold-pressed sunflower oil, Cumin
powder, Coriander powder, Kashmiri red chilli powder, Dried mango powder
(amchur), Ginger powder, Black salt, Sea salt
Tags: Masala, Spicy, Indian, Bold


--- Product F: Premium Raw Makhana (https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/products/raw-makhana) ---
Slug: raw-makhana
Name: Premium Raw Makhana
Tagline: Hand-Sorted Jumbo Grade — The Foundation of Every Great Pop.
MRP: Contact for pricing
Net Weights: 5kg bulk, 10kg bulk, 25kg bulk

Description:
The raw ingredient that makes Golden Deer special. Each seed is hand-sorted,
graded by size, and selected for its pristine white colour and uniform shape.
Sourced directly from farming partner cooperatives in Bihar's makhana belt, our
raw makhana represents the highest standard of purity available to wholesalers,
retailers, and food businesses.

Full Description:
Behind every perfect puff of Golden Deer lies an uncompromising raw material.
Our Premium Raw Makhana is the largest, brightest jumbo grade — what the trade
calls 5-6 suta — sourced from the Gangetic wetlands of Bihar where makhana has
been cultivated for centuries. Each lot is hand-sorted by experienced graders
who remove discoloured seeds, broken pieces, and any grain below our size
threshold. The result is a consistently superior raw product that roasts evenly,
puffs fully, and delivers the signature ethereal crunch that defines Golden Deer.

Nutrition (per 100g): Energy 347 kcal, Protein 9.7g, Carbs 76.9g, Fat 0.1g
Ingredients: Premium raw makhana (fox nuts) — 100% pure, no additives
Tags: Raw, Bulk, Wholesale, Jumbo Grade, Unroasted

Bulk Spec:
  Grades:
    - 5-6 Suta Jumbo (18-24mm) — hand-sorted, brightest premium pops, export grade
    - 4-5 Suta Standard (14-18mm) — culinary and roasting grade for HoReCa
  Packaging: 250g retail pouch, 5kg bulk bag, 10kg bulk bag, 25kg bulk bag
  MOQ: Discussed on inquiry — works with small-batch artisans and large buyers
  Quality: Touchless roasting/sorting, nitrogen-flushed packaging, direct farm
  sourcing, lot traceable to grower cooperative, third-party lab testing available


================================================================================
3. FULL FAQ — ALL 14 QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS
================================================================================

--- Consumer FAQs (9) ---

Q1: Makhana konsa lu — roasted ya raw?
A: Agar aapko ready-to-eat snack chahiye, Golden Deer Classic Roast lo — it is
already slow-roasted with a light salt, ready to eat straight from the pack. Raw
makhana is for cooking: curries, kheer, or roasting at home with your own masala.
Roasted for snacking, raw for cooking — simple.

Q2: Roasted makhana healthy hai kya?
A: Haan, bilkul. Roasted makhana is one of the healthiest snacks you can eat —
rich in protein (9.7g per 100g), very low in fat (0.1g), and packed with
antioxidants and fibre. Our Classic Roast is slow-roasted in minimal cold-pressed
oil, not fried. No artificial preservatives, no MSG, no trans fats. Great for
weight management, diabetes-friendly, and gluten-free.

Q3: What makes Golden Deer a clean-label brand?
A: Clean-label means every ingredient on the packet is recognisable as real food.
Our Classic Roast has three ingredients: premium makhana, cold-pressed sunflower
oil, and fine sea salt. No artificial flavours, no colours, no MSG, no
preservatives, no palm oil. What you see is what you eat — honest food, no
chemistry experiments.

Q4: Makhana vs chips — which is better?
A: There is no comparison. A 50g serving of potato chips has about 270 calories
and 17g of fat. The same serving of Golden Deer makhana has roughly 170 calories
and less than 0.1g of fat. Makhana also delivers protein, fibre, and antioxidants
that chips simply do not have. Our flavoured variants give you the same satisfying
savoury experience without the oil or artificial aftertaste.

Q5: Can makhana help with weight loss?
A: Makhana is an excellent snack for weight management. High protein and fibre
content keep you fuller for longer, reducing the urge to binge on empty calories.
The low glycaemic index means no insulin spikes followed by sugar crashes. At
barely 0.1g fat per 100g, you get the crunch without the guilt.

Q6: Kitna makhana roz kha sakte hain?
A: Ek healthy adult ke liye 30-50g (about 2-3 handfuls) per day is an ideal
portion. This gives you about 4-5g of protein and plenty of fibre without
overdoing it. As with any food, balance is key.

Q7: Makhana ko kaise store karein?
A: Roasted makhana ko hamesha airtight container mein rakhein, cool and dry
jagah par. Dhoop aur nami se door rakhein. Properly stored, our nitrogen-flushed
packs stay fresh for 6-8 months. Once opened, consume within 15-20 days for best
crunch. Agar makhana apni crunch kho de, unhe 2-3 minutes ke liye low flame par
dry roast karein — wapas crisp ho jayenge.

Q8: Is makhana gluten-free?
A: Yes, makhana (fox nuts) is naturally gluten-free — it is not a grain but a
seed harvested from the Euryale ferox water lily. All Golden Deer products are
processed in a dedicated facility with no gluten-containing ingredients. Safe for
celiacs and anyone on a gluten-free diet.

Q9: Bacchon ke liye makhana safe hai?
A: Haan, makhana is one of the best first snacks for kids. It is naturally
soft-crunchy (no hard edges), easy to digest, and packed with calcium and protein
for growing bodies. For toddlers, crush the classic roast into smaller pieces to
prevent any choking risk. No artificial colours or preservatives. A perfect
tiffin snack for school-going children.

--- Bulk FAQs (5) ---

Q10: What is 5-6 suta makhana — and why does grade matter?
A: Suta is the traditional grading system for makhana, referring to the number of
radial lines or the size range. 5-6 suta means 18-24mm diameter — the largest,
most premium grade available. Bigger seeds pop into bigger, fluffier puffs with
better texture and presentation. Golden Deer standardises on 5-6 suta jumbo grade
for our retail products, while offering 4-5 suta (14-18mm) as a culinary grade.
Grade directly affects pop yield, finished product consistency, and plate appeal.

Q11: How to order bulk makhana from Golden Deer as a wholesale buyer?
A: Visit our /bulk page and fill the segmented inquiry form, or message us
directly on WhatsApp with your requirement — quantity, preferred grade, packaging
format, and destination. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a custom
quote including FOB/CIF for export orders or delivered pricing for domestic. We
work with retailers, distributors, HoReCa chains, white-label brands, corporate
gifting buyers, and export partners. No minimum order is too small for a serious
inquiry, and we can scale to multi-tonne container loads for export.

Q12: Do you supply raw makhana for other brands to roast and pack?
A: Yes — white-label raw makhana supply is a core part of our business. We supply
premium raw makhana (both 5-6 suta jumbo and 4-5 suta standard grades) in bulk
packaging to retail brands, food processors, and HoReCa operators. Every lot is
hand-sorted, size-graded, and optionally nitrogen-flushed for extended shelf
life. We can also provide third-party lab analysis for your quality assurance
team. Contact us via the bulk inquiry form or WhatsApp.

Q13: What does nitrogen-flushed packaging do for makhana?
A: Nitrogen flushing replaces the oxygen inside the pack with food-grade nitrogen
gas before sealing. This prevents oxidation, which is the primary cause of
rancidity in nuts and seeds. For makhana, nitrogen flushing preserves the
delicate crunch, prevents moisture absorption, and extends ambient shelf life
from 3 months to 8-12 months without any chemical preservatives. All Golden Deer
bulk packs offer nitrogen flushing as a standard option.

Q14: Corporate gifting with makhana — what are the minimums and options?
A: We offer custom-branded corporate gifting boxes with a minimum of 50 units per
order. Options include: curated assortment boxes (all 5 roasted flavours in
individual packs), premium gift tins with a single large format bag, or bulk raw
makhana hampers for health-conscious clients. Custom branding, personalised
notes, and festive packaging (Diwali, wedding season, corporate events) are
available. Lead time is typically 7-10 working days for quantities under 500
units.


================================================================================
4. BULK & WHOLESALE OFFER
================================================================================

Golden Deer serves four wholesale audiences:

1. Distributors & Retailers — Stock India's cleanest crunch across your network.
   Competitive trade pricing, consistent supply, and marketing support.

2. HoReCa & Institutions — Elevate your menu with makhana-based dishes. Bulk raw
   and roasted grades for hotels, restaurants, caterers, and cafeterias.

3. Corporate Gifting — Custom-branded gift boxes with premium makhana
   assortments. Minimum 50 units, 7-10 day lead time, festive packaging options.

4. Export Inquiries — FOB/CIF pricing for international buyers. Jumbo grade 5-6
   suta, third-party lab reports, container-load capacity.

Partner Benefits:
  - Direct farm-gate pricing — no middlemen
  - Consistent 5-6 suta jumbo grade quality
  - Touchless roasting and sorting facility
  - Nitrogen-flushed packaging for extended shelf life
  - Third-party lab analysis on every lot
  - Flexible MOQ — from small artisans to container loads

How It Works:
  1. Tell us what you need via the inquiry form or WhatsApp.
  2. Receive a custom quote within 24 hours.
  3. Order and delivery within 5-7 working days.

Bulk inquiry URL: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/bulk
WhatsApp: +91 97791 55132


================================================================================
5. OUR STORY
================================================================================

Golden Deer began with a simple observation: India's favourite snack grain was
being sold as a commodity when it deserved to be celebrated as a superfood. For
centuries, makhana has been harvested from the Gangetic wetlands of Bihar by
farming families who have cultivated this crop for generations. Yet the farmers
received commodity pricing while the end consumer ate products with artificial
flavours and questionable ingredients.

Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd. was founded to change that. By building direct farm
partnerships, the company guarantees fair prices for growers while securing the
finest jumbo-grade seeds for its brand. Every seed is hand-sorted, size-graded,
and traceable to a specific grower cooperative and harvest date.

The processing facility uses touchless slow-roasting technology — a dry-heat
process that preserves the natural structure, delicate crunch, and nutritional
profile of the makhana. No frying, no trans fats, no compromise. The finished
product is nitrogen-flushed within hours of roasting, locking in freshness
without chemical preservatives.

Today, Golden Deer offers six products across two distinct customer channels:
retail consumers who buy via quick-commerce platforms, and business buyers
(distributors, HoReCa, corporate, export) who work directly with the company
through its bulk program.

Details: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/our-story


================================================================================
6. RECIPES
================================================================================

Golden Deer makhana can be used in six signature recipes. Full ingredient lists
and step-by-step instructions are at the recipe pages.

1. Makhana Bhel: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/recipes/makhana-bhel
   A lighter, crunchier twist on Mumbai's iconic street food. Classic-roast
   makhana replaces fried puri. 10 minutes, serves 2.

2. Makhana Kheer: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/recipes/makhana-kheer
   Royal Indian dessert — roasted fox nuts simmered in sweetened milk until
   soft. Uses raw makhana. 35 minutes, serves 4.

3. Peri Peri Makhana: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/recipes/peri-peri-makhana
   DIY peri-peri with smoked paprika and bird's eye chilli. 15 minutes, serves 2.

4. Makhana Chaat: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/recipes/makhana-chaat
   Five-minute chaat with yoghurt and chutneys. Serves 2.

5. Golden Trail Mix: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/recipes/golden-trail-mix
   Energy snack with nuts, seeds, dried fruit, and dark chocolate. 5 minutes.

6. Makhana Curry: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/recipes/makhana-curry
   North Indian-style curry in rich onion-tomato gravy. 30 minutes, serves 3.
